productDisplayName: Nike Women Capri White Casual Shoes
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these nike capri II shoes are perfect for you. Designed for the tennis-lover, these shoes are a great combination of comfort and style. Featuring stitch and overlay details on a base colour, the nike capri II sneakers are a great add-on to the wardrobe. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperSynthetic leather upper for absolute comfort and durabilityCentral lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and collar for all-day comfortMidsoleAutoclave construction midsole for enhanced cushioning EVA injected midsole for lightweight feelOutsoleSolid rubber outsole in herringbone pattern for superior grip Pivot point below the big toe mound for superior traction Staright line grooves below toes and heel for traction and stabilityWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
